channel.title: CitizensAssembly on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in CitizensAssembly on Nature Works

item.title: Biodiversity Assembly
item.description:
Climate Assemblies are a thing, isn’t it time for a companion Biodversity Assembly? ?

I went to a KNOCA (Knowledge Network on Climate Assemblies) called Unheard Voices, very interesting. http://localhost:1313/blog/240122-biodiversity-assembly/

item.title: Participatory Democracy
item.description:
Democracy is good for the environment

On Monday 16 January, I went to a 1.5 hour Zoom talk and discussion about a participatory democracy project run by an organisation called Gwyrddni (translates as Green Us I think). http://localhost:1313/blog/230118-democracy/
